---
title: "Rowland Jones-Bateman"
---

## Rowland Jones-Bateman

**Dates:** (1826-16 Dec 1896)

### Description

of Otterbourne Grange, Eastleigh

### Biography

His name is sometimes spelt Jones Bateman.  He was a barrister, educated at Winchester and New College, Oxford. He made friends with JBY on fishing trip to Norway, hence moved to Otterbourne, conspicuous in parish work.  His wife was Jessy Burlton (b. 1839/40).  The family were in London in the 1871, Otterbourne in the 1881 census. [CMY’s obituary in the <i>Otterbourne Parish Magazine</i>; LG 1952 Jones Bateman]

### Letters

- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Decr 21st 1898](../letters/3389_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- Letter from October 10, 1890.
- Letter from May 8 th [1876]
- Letter from May 1st 1876
- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
